description: Penantia n8n workflow definitions — auto-restore after Space restart

workflows.name: 1. Auto Test (2min silent)
workflows.purpose: Agent self-directs stress tests, writes source=synthetic to agent_insights

workflows.name: 2. Self-Heal (15min silent)
workflows.purpose: Detect recurring errors, create draft PRs on GitHub

workflows.name: 3. SEO Intelligence (2hr)
workflows.purpose: GSC data + web research → Keywords Sheet. Intelligence only, no blog writing.

workflows.name: 4. Blog Queue Review (daily 7am AEST)
workflows.purpose: Review keywords with ready_for_blog=yes, create briefs (max 3/day), NO full blogs

workflows.name: 5. Daily 8am AEST Summary
workflows.purpose: Summarise SEO intelligence + system health, send Telegram

seo_architecture.philosophy: Intelligence runs continuously. Blog writing is gated by approval.
seo_architecture.intelligence_cadence: Every 2 hours — GSC + web research → Keywords Sheet
seo_architecture.blog_cadence: Daily brief review — max 3 briefs queued per day
seo_architecture.approval_required: Yes — you review briefs weekly and approve which to expand
seo_architecture.no_spam_rule: Never write full blogs automatically — briefs only until approved
